name: Matrix Poly
explanation: A deeply-modulated dual-filter analog polyphonic synthesizer with six voices. Each voice runs two oscillators (a band-limited saw and a PWM pulse) into a smooth resonant low-pass shaped by its own filter envelope. A global modulation LFO is matrix-routed at once to filter cutoff, oscillator pitch and pulse width, so held chords slowly breathe and evolve. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Mod Depth, Mod Rate, Attack, Release and Level.
